content: Choose what happens to links created before the restriction:

comment.text: Instructional label for a radio button group in the Access Control security settings, prompting the user to select an action for links created prior to a restriction.

usage.context:
<Text
 fontSize="13px"
 fontWeight="600"
 className={styles.appliesTo}
 >
 {t("Settings:LinksBeforeRestriction")}
 </Text>
 <RadioButtonGroup
 className={styles.radioGroup}
 fontSize="13px"
 fontWeight="400"
